channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Saturday, May 16, 2026
item.description: The two biggest threads today sit at opposite ends of Midya's world: international student enrolment has now officially collapsed to pandemic-era lows, with PGWP confusion adding another layer of harm — a direct signal that Canadian universities are desperate for strategic help c...
